jobDescription: Who are Meta Pack? No we are not a packaging company – that’s Tetra Pack! We are a tech company that works with a lot of the world’s biggest ecommerce players to integrate them with over 450 carriers around the world to make delivery easy. We are a multi-tenant Saa S platform. We give them the platform to help consumers decide their delivery preference and track the parcel’s progress whilst also providing the retailer with intelligent smart decisions about how to send the parcel – all underpinned with lots of data. We work with well-known global retailers and major brands such as ASOS, Adidas, Burberry, John Lewis, Boohoo, e Bay, and Zalando. In fact we work with so many retailers and carriers it’s highly likely that you’ve interacted with us at some point when ordering goods online! In August 2018, we were acquired by Fortune 100’s 2nd fastest growing company, stamps.com. We have super ambitious and exciting plans all centred around our tech. Meta Pack will play a role in shipping around 600 million parcels in 2018 and with the wider stamps.com family the number rises to 2.5bn parcels. Meta Pack has been growing at 40% year on year over the last 5 years and continues to grow at a rapid rate. Working as part of the Customer Delivery function the Implementation Analyst will manage and deliver the implementation requirements of key and corporate customers and co-ordinate all parties (both internally and with our customers) and deliverables for small and medium new business accounts. In addition you will form part of the delivery team for large, complex or non-standard implementation projects working closely with project management, business analysis and client solutions teams for new and existing accounts. We are looking for highly enthusiastic technical implementation professionals or recent degree educated graduates who will support a powerful and effective customer experience What would I be doing? Facilitating integrations by introducing API’s and/or configure file import using graphical interface Troubleshooting SOAP and REST API issues Writing data import routines (file import) using GUI tools Writing and maintaining application and configuration help files Automating job scheduler configurations Client monitoring and client site visits to provide technical and operational assistance and knowledge Training customers in use of Meta Pack software and concepts, assistance with configuring printers, provide the client and Meta Pack with label printing expertise and knowledge Configuration of client parameters for pricing, zones, cut-off time, carrier services and providing on-site support for go-live Liaising with client and carriers for compliance approval and sign off Producing and maintaining project documentation in accordance with the Delivery Framework Co-ordinating and managing a range of carrier interactions such as client account information gathering, client approval process, ensuring each carrier updates Meta Pack as per other key clients and ensuring timely status updates Who are you? Able to interact with customers on a technical and non-technical basis using English Strong communicator with influencing skills Able to work on your own initiative with limited supervision Excellent time management and organisational acumen Pro-active thinker and problem solver Able to manage multiple clients and projects/tasks simultaneously Have the capability to manage client expectations Strong troubleshooter: You will be responsible for detecting potential issues and implementing solutions when issues threaten to delay the timeline or impact budget or business operation Configuration guru: You will configure the application based on implementation plan. ( This does not require knowledge of any development language) You will be responsible for providing stakeholders with updated implementation plans What are the perks?30 days holiday (increasing based on length of service once you have been with us for 2 years) Work in a great atmosphere, with people who like what they do and are willing to share their knowledge Private medical healthcare Discounted gym membership Free language courses - English, German, Spanish Fresh fruit, snacks and drinks Relax room Hardware budget to let you get what you need Dynamic, open culture with lots of social activities
